pages.title: Monk
pages.text: Combat primary. The holy order — warrior-monk identity. Thirty items, self-contained.$(br2)Two blocks of gear: Bishop (armored) and Priest (caster), plus magnum torches and two spell books.

pages.title: Bishop block (armored)
pages.text: $(bold)Paladin Armor.$(/) Blessed plate. Gold and copper.$(br2)$(bold)Crusader Armor.$(/) Gold-block and diamond reinforcement, ghast-tear crown.$(br2)$(bold)Holy Armor.$(/) Radiant top tier, totem-anchored.$(br2)$(bold)Holy Staff$(/) and $(bold)Diamond Holy Staff.$(/) Two-handed melee.

pages.title: Priest block (caster)
pages.text: $(bold)Acolyte, Holy, and Diamond Holy Wands.$(/) Casting focuses across three tiers.$(br2)$(bold)Priest Robe$(/) and $(bold)Prior Robe.$(/) Chainmail-lined, gold-trimmed.$(br2)$(bold)Magnum Torches.$(/) Diamond, emerald, and amethyst. Wide-area mob-spawn suppression.

pages.title: Notes
pages.text: Theme is gold-block, glowstone, and totem of undying.$(br2)Matching trader: the Bishop and the Priest.
